prompts.title: Live regression smoke after latest commits
prompts.prompt: Confirm /jarvis and /api/jarvis/status return 200 after the latest JARVIS commits, that commander_snapshot and system_map are present and ready, and that the new api_key fields display. Report findings as text. Do not modify files or commit anything.
prompts.notes: Manual operator prompt only. Display-only in JARVIS.

prompts.title: Generate cached health report
prompts.prompt: Run tools/jarvis_health_report.py to refresh storage/jarvis/health_report.json. This only writes a cached report; it does not change app code or commit anything.
prompts.notes: Offline cached-report generator. JARVIS reads the result; the web app never runs it.

prompts.title: Generate cached route smoke report
prompts.prompt: Run tools/jarvis_route_smoke_report.py against the local server to refresh storage/jarvis/route_smoke_report.json. GET-only probes; no bodies stored; no commit.
prompts.notes: Offline GET-only probe. The web route only reads the cached result.

prompts.title: Review mission board
prompts.prompt: Read docs/jarvis_mission_board.json and summarize missions by status and priority. Do not execute any mission and do not edit the file.
prompts.notes: Display-only review of the tracked mission board.

prompts.title: Check JARVIS git status only
prompts.prompt: Report git status --short and git diff --cached --name-only. Do not stage, commit, push, reset, or modify anything. Reading only.
prompts.notes: Inspection only. No staging or commits.

prompts.title: Audit JARVIS for execution controls
prompts.prompt: Audit templates/jarvis.html and the /jarvis + /api/jarvis/status handlers for any buttons, forms, onclick, POST routes, or copy-and-run behavior. Report findings as text. Make no changes.
prompts.notes: Read-only safety audit of the console surface.

prompts.title: Draft a JARVIS docs index
prompts.prompt: Draft a plain-text index of JARVIS artifacts: tracked data files (mission board, prompt library, system map), cached report locations, the three offline tools, and the audit memo. One line per item. Output text only; write no code and commit nothing.
prompts.notes: Documentation aid. Produces text, not changes.

prompts.title: Panel consistency audit
prompts.prompt: Cross-reference the system map panels, their documented api_key values, the live /api/jarvis/status keys, and the rendered UI panel ids. Report any mismatches as text. Make no changes and commit nothing.

prompts.title: Cache freshness audit
prompts.prompt: Inspect the generated_at timestamps in the cached JARVIS reports and describe how stale each one is relative to now. Propose a display-only freshness threshold. Output text only; add no execution controls.
prompts.notes: Read-only freshness review. Produces text, not changes.

prompts.title: UI polish plan
prompts.prompt: Propose cosmetic layout, spacing, and label improvements for the JARVIS console. No new buttons, forms, POST routes, or capabilities. Output the plan as text only; write no code and commit nothing.
prompts.notes: Cosmetic planning prompt. No new capability or execution affordance.
